name: RBI CoR expiry alert — notify admin 60 days before NBFC CoR expires
notes: Daily cron at 30 0 * * * (00:30 UTC ≈ 06:00 IST) added to vercel.json
Idempotency enforced by unique index on (nbfc_id, cor_expiry_date) with onConflictDoNothing in the job
Resolved pre-existing slug conflict by renaming src/app/api/admin/nbfc/[id]/route.ts to [nbfcId]/route.ts (no URL change)
